zh.Waddington, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾瓦丁頓
zh.Waterstock, Oxfordshire, England: 英國奧可福爾沃特斯東可
zh.Waterstock, Oxfordshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾沃特斯東可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Bardolf於1142年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾瓦丁頓時，她的父親William Bardolf17歲，母親Amabilia De Lindsay13歲。她於1169年與Bartholomew Foliot在英國英格蘭奧可福爾沃特斯東可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Waterstock, Oxfordshire, England: 英国奧可福爾沃特斯東可
zh-hans.Waterstock, Oxfordshire, England, United: 英国英格兰奧可福爾沃特斯東可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily Bardolf于1142年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾瓦丁頓时，她的父亲William Bardolf17岁，母亲Amabilia De Lindsay13岁。她于1169年与Bartholomew Foliot在英国英格兰奧可福爾沃特斯東可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Bardolf was born in 1142, in Waddington, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Bardolf, was 17 and her mother, Amabilia De Lindsay, was 13. She married Bartholomew Foliot in 1169, in Waterstock, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Bardolf est née en 1142, à Waddington, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Bardolf, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Amabilia De Lindsay, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Bartholomew Foliot en 1169, à Waterstock, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily Bardolf 1142 in Waddington, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Bardolf 17 und ihre Mutter Amabilia De Lindsay 13. Sie hat 1169 in Waterstock, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Bartholomew Foliot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Bardolf è nata il nel 1142 nel Waddington, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Bardolf, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Amabilia De Lindsay, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Bartholomew Foliot nel 1169, nel Waterstock, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Bardolfが1142年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアワッドイントンで生まれた時，父William Bardolfは17歳，母Amabilia De Lindsayは13歳であった。1169年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアワテルストックでBartholomew Foliotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Bardolf(이)가 1142년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 와딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Bardolf(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amabilia De Lindsay(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1169년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 왓르스톡에서 Bartholomew Foliot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Bardolf nasceu em 1142, em Waddington, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Bardolf, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Amabilia De Lindsay, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Bartholomew Foliot em 1169, em Waterstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Bardolf родилась в 1142 г. в местности ваддингтон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Bardolf было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Amabilia De Lindsay, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bartholomew Foliot в 1169 г. в местности вэитирстокк, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily Bardolf nació en 1142, en Waddington, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Bardolf, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Amabilia De Lindsay, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Bartholomew Foliot en 1169, en Waterstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
